property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\temp\java_JDK21\java-21-openjdk-21.0.10.0.7-1.win.jdk.x86_64\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\temp\java_JDK21\java-21-openjdk-21.0.10.0.7-1.win.jdk.x86_64\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Pulse Secure\VC142.CRT\X64\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Pulse Secure\VC142.CRT\X86\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Pulse Secure\TNC Client Plugin\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\MATLAB\R2025b\bin;C:\Program Files\MATLAB\R2025a\bin;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\Windows Performance Toolkit\;C:\apache-maven-3.9.16-bin\apache-maven-3.9.16\bin;C:\Users\abc03\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Users\abc03\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\;C:\Users\abc03\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\abc03\.local\bin;C:\temp\java_JDK\java-1.8.0-openjdk-1.8.0.482.b08-1.win.jdk.x86_64\bin;C:\Users\abc03\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\abc03\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\abc03\.dotnet\tools;C:\intelFPGA_lite\18.1\modelsim_ase\win32aloem;C:\Users\abc03\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity\bin;C:\Users\abc03\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\abc03\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity IDE\bin;.

testcase.name: testUdpMulticastDiscovery
testcase.system-out: Node-2 discovered peer: Node-1 on IP 192.168.56.1

testcase.name: testTcpFileTransfer
testcase.system-out: Node-1 Send started. Node-2 Receive started: test_transfer2188182489529527731.dat Node-1 Send completed. Node-2 Receive completed: ./downloaded_test_transfer2188182489529527731.dat
